title: colysis macrophylla
intro: Colysis macrophylla, also known as the large-leaf colysis, is a species of fern native to Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against certain diseases. Colysis macrophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to support immune function and cardiovascular health.
